case_title: OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. LESLY YANETH DIAZ RODRIQUEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, LESLY YANETH DIAZ $679.22 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $794.22 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT LESLY YANETH DIAZ RODRIQUEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,003.22 FILED BY OPORTUN INC., (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIQUEZ, LESLY YANETH DIAZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
